note: Frozen live state; superseded items deliberately absent. Authored before the harness.

active_claims.what: the crash is caused by a threading bug: the sync writes to the database off the main actor, causing a race

active_constraints.what: the sync feature requires iOS 15 as the minimum; iOS 14 is no longer supported

decisions.what: default the sync feature flag OFF and enable gradually; defaulting it ON was dropped

open_conflicts.what: rollout speed: product wants a 50 percent rollout next week vs QA wants 10 percent for two weeks first

open_questions.what: the exact staged-rollout percentages beyond the first step
